dag._9: This is a list ofTaskTemplateExpansion, i.e. Task with all their  arguments bound. Type 1.
dag._10: It works for OneMod because the stages are linear and end with a collect task.
dag._11: The downstream TTE is cannot start until all upstreams are done.
dag._12: That dependency is indicated by the pair (<upstream_stage_name>,all).
dag._13: More complex dependencies are definitely not MVP and might always require python.
